blocks.content: USC was nothing like Millhaven. Kit hadn't been prepared for the actual size of it — the campus sprawling in every direction, palm trees lining the walkways.
His roommate's name was Darius. Pre-med, from Atlanta, had already organized his side of the room with a precision that made Kit feel vaguely chaotic.

blocks.speaker: Darius
blocks.content: Cool. I don't understand film people but I respect the commitment.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I don't understand pre-med people but same.
They got along fine after that.
LA was hot in August. Not Georgia hot — a different kind of dry and relentless. He walked to his first orientation session in shorts and a t-shirt.
there are palm trees everywhere. like too many. its excessive
all of them. every single one is too many
it was 52 degrees when i woke up this morning. in august. kit. 52 degrees
ok maybe some palm trees are acceptable
my roommate is from Iowa. she brought four winter coats. i thought that was excessive. i no longer think that
you're going to need a real coat
a georgia coat or an actual coat
